historical_facts.claim: LendingProtocol enables fixed-term uncollateralized loans using pooled funds from a Single Asset Vault.
historical_facts.quote_or_summary: Known Amendments says creditworthiness is assessed through off-chain underwriting and risk management.

historical_outcome.outcome_summary: Open-for-voting financial primitive at the source snapshot.

safe_route_label.label: HOLD_FOR_CHALLENGE
safe_route_label.notes: Uncollateralized lending with off-chain underwriting deserves explicit governance review.

short_description: On-chain fixed-term uncollateralized loans using pooled funds.

sources.summary: XRPL validators vote on amendments; more than 80% support must hold for two weeks, and servers without enabled amendment code become amendment-blocked.
XRPL's public known-amendments inventory, including status, default vote, amendment IDs, and descriptions.

technical_change: Lending protocol depends on Single Asset Vaults and off-chain underwriting.
